expectations.text: Skill does NOT output 'nothing to catch up on' bail-out message
expectations.evidence: Output does not contain any bail-out message. Claude produced a full summary.

expectations.text: Output contains a Catchup Briefing section
expectations.evidence: Output contains 'Catch Up Summary' (equivalent section header). Baseline used its own format.

expectations.text: Output contains a Recent Changes section listing commits
expectations.evidence: Output contains 'Recent Changes (last 20 commits)' with all 20 commits listed.
